tools.name: 1-0_adjust-inventory-stock-levels
tools.description: Adjusts stock quantities for product variants. Stock quantities can be added or subtracted, set with a given number, or marked as 'unlimited'. All quantity information is stored in InventoryItems. Optional: decrementOperations, incrementOperations, setFiniteOperations (plus 1 more).

params.name: decrementOperations
params.description: Optional; array of objects. Subtracts stock quantity for InventoryItems.

params.name: incrementOperations
params.description: Optional; array of objects. Increments stock quantity for InventoryItems.

params.name: setFiniteOperations
params.description: Optional; array of objects. Sets the exact stock quantity for InventoryItems.

params.name: setUnlimitedOperations
params.description: Optional; array of InventoryItem ids. Marks stock quantity as 'unlimited' for the given InventoryItems.

tools.name: 1-0_create-order
tools.description: Creates an order using information from a third-party sales channel. A successful request creates an Order resource. Required: channelName, createdOn, externalOrderReference, fulfillments, grandTotal, lineItems, priceTaxInterpretation. Optional: billingAddress, customerEmail, discountLines (plus 10 more). Returns the new Order.

params.name: billingAddress
params.description: Customer's shipping address.

params.name: channelName
params.description: Name of third-party sales channel.

params.name: createdOn
params.description: ISO 8601 UTC date and time string. Represents the date and time when the order was placed through the third-party sales channel.

params.name: customerEmail
params.description: Email address provided at checkout on the third-party sales channel.

params.name: discountLines
params.description: Array of discount line items. Describes the promotions redeemed during checkout.

params.name: discountTotal
params.description: A monetary amount with currency code and decimal value

params.name: externalOrderReference
params.description: Order reference identifier used by the third-party sales channel.

params.name: fulfilledOn
params.description: ISO 8601 UTC date and time string. Represents the moment the order was fulfilled. Required if fulfillmentStatus is FULFILLED.

params.name: fulfillmentStatus
params.description: Current fulfillment status of the order. Value may be PENDING or FULFILLED.

params.name: fulfillments
params.description: Array of shipping fulfillments; up to 100 entries. Describes shipment information for the order.

params.name: grandTotal
params.description: A monetary amount with currency code and decimal value

params.name: inventoryBehavior
params.description: Indicates whether to deduct stock quantity for the product variant upon Order creation. Values may be DEDUCT or SKIP. Defaults to SKIP.

params.name: lineItems
params.description: Array of purchased line items; cannot be empty.

params.name: priceTaxInterpretation
params.description: Indicates that lineItems.unitPricePaid includes tax. Values may be EXCLUSIVE or INCLUSIVE.

params.name: shippingAddress
params.description: Customer's shipping address.

params.name: shippingLines
params.description: Array of shipping line items. Describes the shipping options chosen at checkout. Currently accepts only one shipping entry.

params.name: shippingTotal
params.description: A monetary amount with currency code and decimal value

params.name: shopperFulfillmentNotificationBehavior
params.description: Indicates whether to send a fulfillment notification email to the customer. Value may be SEND or SKIP.

params.name: subtotal
params.description: A monetary amount with currency code and decimal value

params.name: taxTotal
params.description: A monetary amount with currency code and decimal value

tools.name: 1-0_create-webhook-subscription
tools.description: Creates a webhook subscription. A successful request returns the created Webhook Subscription resource. Required: endpointUrl. Optional: topics.

params.name: endpointUrl
params.description: HTTPS URL to POST webhook notifications.

params.name: topics
params.description: List of event topics that trigger a webhook notification.

tools.name: 1-0_delete-webhook-subscription
tools.description: Deletes a webhook subscription. Required: subscriptionId. Destructive.

params.name: subscriptionId
params.description: Specifies the Webhook Subscription to delete.

tools.name: 1-0_fulfill-order
tools.description: Updates the status of a specific order to fulfilled, with options to include shipment information and send a customer notification. Required: id. Optional: shipments, shouldSendNotification.

params.name: id
params.description: Specifies the Order to update.

params.name: shipments
params.description: Array of shipment data.

params.name: shouldSendNotification
params.description: Indicates whether the customer should receive an email notification about the added shipments.

tools.name: 1-0_get-documents-by-id
tools.description: Retrieves information for specific transaction Documents. The response contains up to 50 Documents. Multiple Documents can be retrieved by providing a comma-separated list of Document ids. Required: documentIds. Returns the TransactionListResponse.

params.name: documentIds
params.description: Specifies the Documents to retrieve. Multiple Documents can be retrieved by providing a comma-separated list of Document ids.

tools.name: 1-0_get-documents-by-updated-on
tools.description: Retrieves all financial transactions for orders and donations. Per order and donation, the response groups transactions into a Document, contains up to 50 Documents ordered by their modification date (modifiedOn), and supports dynamic cursors for pagination. Optional: cursor, modifiedAfter, modifiedBefore (plus 1 more). Returns the PaginatedTransactionListResponse.

params.name: cursor
params.description: Identifies where the next page of results should begin. Should be the value of pagination.nextPageCursor from a previous response.

params.name: modifiedAfter
params.description: Time-boxes the request to Documents that were modified after a given ISO 8601 UTC date and time string (YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss.sZ).

params.name: modifiedBefore
params.description: Time-boxes the request to Documents that were modified before a given ISO 8601 UTC date and time string (YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss.sZ).

params.name: orderId
params.description: Order id

tools.name: 1-0_get-inventory-items
tools.description: Retrieves real-time stock information for all product variants. Stock information is stored in an InventoryItem for each product variant. The response contains up to 50 InventoryItems and supports dynamic cursors for pagination. Optional: cursor. Returns the PaginatedInventoryItemListResponse.

params.name: cursor
params.description: Identifies where the next page of results should begin. Should be the value of pagination.nextPageCursor from a previous response. If not present or empty, the endpoint returns up to 50 InventoryItems.

tools.name: 1-0_get-member-profile
tools.description: Retrieves basic details about the Squarespace member who owns the provided OAuth token. Returns the MemberProfile.

tools.name: 1-0_get-order
tools.description: Retrieves information for a specific order. The response contains order information in an Order. Required: id. Returns the Order.

params.name: id
params.description: Specifies the Order to retrieve.

tools.name: 1-0_get-orders
tools.description: Retrieves information about all orders. Orders can be filtered by Customer ID and date ranges. The response contains order information in an Order, up to 50 Orders ordered by their modification date (modifiedOn), and supports dynamic cursors for pagination. Optional: customerId, modifiedAfter, modifiedBefore (plus 2 more). Returns the OrderListResponse.

params.name: customerId
params.description: Used to filter Orders by Customer ID.

params.name: modifiedAfter
params.description: Time-boxes the request to Orders that were modified after a given ISO 8601 UTC date and time string (YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss.sZ). Required when modifiedBefore is passed; cannot be used with cursor.

params.name: modifiedBefore
params.description: Time-boxes the request to Orders that were modified before a given ISO 8601 UTC date and time string (YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss.sZ). Required when modifiedAfter is passed; cannot be used with cursor.

params.name: cursor
params.description: Identifies where the next page of results should begin. Should be the value of pagination.nextPageCursor from a previous response. Cannot be used with other parameters.

params.name: fulfillmentStatus
params.description: Used to filter Orders by fulfillment status. Values may be PENDING, FULFILLED, or CANCELED.

tools.name: 1-0_get-profiles
tools.description: Retrieves all profiles; profiles can be filtered and sorted. The response contains up to 50 Profiles and supports dynamic cursors for pagination. Optional: sortDirection, sortField, filter (plus 2 more). Returns the PaginatedProfileListResponse.

params.name: sortDirection
params.description: Identifies the sort direction of the result list; asc for ascending or dsc for descending. If not specified, the returned list is in descending order.

params.name: sortField
params.description: Identifies the sort field of the result list. Values include: createdOn, id, email, or lastName. If not specified, the returned list is sorted by id.

params.name: filter
params.description: Semicolon separated list used to filter profile results. Values include: isCustomer and/or hasAccount, or email. The email filter cannot be used with isCustomer or hasAccount.

params.name: email
params.description: Email address filter (URL-encoded, case insensitive).

params.name: cursor
params.description: Identifies where the next page of results should begin. Should be the value of pagination.nextPageCursor from a previous response. Cannot be used with other parameters.

tools.name: 1-0_get-specific-inventory-items
tools.description: Retrieves real-time stock information for specific product variants. Stock information is stored in an InventoryItem and up to 50 InventoryItems can be retrieved per request. Required: variantIdCsvs. Returns the InventoryItemListResponse.

params.name: variantIdCsvs
params.description: Specifies the InventoryItems to retrieve. Multiple InventoryItems can be retrieved by providing a comma-separated list: {id1},{id2}..., though the same sequence is not guaranteed in the response.

tools.name: 1-0_get-specific-profiles
tools.description: Retrieves information for specific profiles. The response contains a list of up to 50 Profiles. Multiple Profiles can be retrieved by providing a comma-separated list of profile ids. Required: profileIdCsvs. Returns the ProfileListResponse.

params.name: profileIdCsvs
params.description: Specifies the profiles to retrieve. Multiple Profiles can be retrieved by providing a comma-separated list of profile ids.

tools.name: 1-0_get-store-pages
tools.description: Retrieves information for all store pages on the website. The response supports dynamic cursors for pagination. Optional: cursor. Returns the PaginatedStorePagesResponse.

params.name: cursor
params.description: Cursor

tools.name: 1-0_get-webhook-subscription
tools.description: Retrieves information for a specific webhook subscription. Required: subscriptionId. Returns the ExternalWebhookSubscriptionResponse.

params.name: subscriptionId
params.description: Specifies the Webhook Subscription to retrieve.

tools.name: 1-0_get-webhook-subscriptions
tools.description: Retrieves information for all webhook subscriptions. The response contains up to 25 Webhook Subscriptions. Returns the ExternalWebhookSubscriptionListResponse.

tools.name: 1-0_get-website-profile
tools.description: Retrieves basic details about the website that owns the provided API key or OAuth token. Returns the WebsiteProfile.

tools.name: 1-0_rotate-subscription-secret
tools.description: Rotates a webhook subscription's secret. The previous secret for a subscription is no longer valid after a new one is generated. Required: subscriptionId. Returns the new ExternalRotateSecretResponse.

params.name: subscriptionId
params.description: Specifies the Webhook Subscription to update.

tools.name: 1-0_send-test-notification-for-webhook-subscription
tools.description: Sends a notification to a subscribed webhook endpoint for testing purposes. This is a one-time notification, and will not be retried if it fails or times out. Required: subscriptionId, topic. Returns the new ExternalTestNotificationResponse.

params.name: subscriptionId
params.description: Specifies the Webhook Subscription to send a notification to.

params.name: topic
params.description: Required; Squarespace event topic that triggers a webhook notification. Possible values include: extension.uninstall, order.create, order.update.

tools.name: 1-0_update-webhook-subscription
tools.description: Updates information for a webhook subscription. A successful request returns the updated Webhook Subscription resource. Required: subscriptionId. Optional: endpointUrl, topics.

params.name: subscriptionId
params.description: Specifies the Webhook Subscription to update.

params.name: endpointUrl
params.description: Optional; HTTPS URL to receive webhook notifications.

params.name: topics
params.description: Optional; list of event topics that trigger a webhook notification. Possible values include: extension.uninstall, order.create, order.update.

tools.name: commerce_associate-product-variant-image
tools.description: Assigns a product image to a product variant. Specifying imageId of null will delete the association. Required: productId, variantId, imageId.

params.name: productId
params.description: Product id

params.name: variantId
params.description: Variant id

params.name: imageId
params.description: Optional; HTTPS URL to receive webhook notifications.

tools.name: commerce_create-product
tools.description: Creates a product with appropriate subresources based on product type. Returns the new ProductV2.

tools.name: commerce_create-product-variant
tools.description: Creates a variant of a product. Creating a variant for a physical or service product requires that the product already has at least one attribute. Required: productId, pricing, sku. Optional: attributes, shippingMeasurements, stock. Returns the new ProductVariantV2.

params.name: productId
params.description: Product id

params.name: attributes
params.description: Specifies attribute-value pairs for the variant. 100 char limit per key and per value with no more than six key-value pairs. Supported for PHYSICAL products only.

params.name: pricing
params.description: Present for DIGITAL products only. Digital products don't have variants, so pricing is at the product level.

params.name: shippingMeasurements
params.description: Measurements of the variant when it's shipped. Present for PHYSICAL products only.

params.name: sku
params.description: Merchant-defined code that identifies the product variant. Value must be unique among variants. Leading and trailing whitespace is removed.

params.name: stock
params.description: Available stock for the variant. Present for PHYSICAL products only.

tools.name: commerce_delete-product
tools.description: Delete specified product. Required: productId. Destructive.

params.name: productId
params.description: Product id

tools.name: commerce_delete-product-image
tools.description: Delete one product image. Required: productId, imageId. Destructive.

params.name: productId
params.description: Product id

params.name: imageId
params.description: Image id

tools.name: commerce_delete-product-variant
tools.description: Delete one product variant. Required: productId, variantId. Destructive.

params.name: productId
params.description: Product id

params.name: variantId
params.description: Variant id

tools.name: commerce_get-product-image-processing-status
tools.description: Retrieves the processing status for an uploaded product image. A successful request indicates that a ProductImage is processing, ready, or in an error state. Required: productId, imageId. Returns the ProductImageProcessingStatus.

params.name: productId
params.description: Product id

params.name: imageId
params.description: Image id

tools.name: commerce_get-products
tools.description: Retrieves information for products; products can be filtered within a date range and by product type. The response contains product information in a Product, up to 50 Products ordered by their modification date (modifiedOn), and supports dynamic cursors for pagination. Optional: modifiedAfter, modifiedBefore, cursor (plus 2 more). Returns the PaginatedProductListResponseV2.

params.name: modifiedAfter
params.description: Modified after

params.name: modifiedBefore
params.description: Modified before

params.name: cursor
params.description: Cursor

params.name: query
params.description: Query

params.name: type
params.description: Type

tools.name: commerce_get-specific-products
tools.description: Retrieves information for specific products, including information for any variants or images. Up to 50 products can be retrieved per request. Required: productIdCsvs. Returns the ProductListResponseV2.

params.name: productIdCsvs
params.description: Product id csvs

tools.name: commerce_update-product
tools.description: Updates information for a product. The endpoint supports partial updates. Required: productId. Optional: description, isVisible, name (plus 5 more). Returns the new ProductV2.

params.name: productId
params.description: Product id

params.name: description
params.description: Optional; HTTPS URL to receive webhook notifications.

params.name: isVisible
params.description: Is visible

params.name: name
params.description: Optional; HTTPS URL to receive webhook notifications.

params.name: pricing
params.description: Pricing data for the product.

params.name: productAttributeNames
params.description: Optional; list of event topics that trigger a webhook notification. Possible values include: extension.uninstall, order.create, order.update.

params.name: seoData
params.description: Options for search engine optimization.

params.name: tags
params.description: Optional; list of event topics that trigger a webhook notification. Possible values include: extension.uninstall, order.create, order.update.

params.name: urlSlug
params.description: Optional; HTTPS URL to receive webhook notifications.

tools.name: commerce_update-product-image
tools.description: Updates information for a product image. Currently, the endpoint only supports updates to the alt text for an image. Required: productId, imageId. Optional: altText. Returns the new ProductImage.

params.name: productId
params.description: Product id

params.name: imageId
params.description: Image id

params.name: altText
params.description: Optional; HTTPS URL to receive webhook notifications.

tools.name: commerce_update-product-image-order
tools.description: Updates the ordering of a product image on the product details page. Required: productId, imageId. Optional: afterImageId.

params.name: productId
params.description: Product id

params.name: imageId
params.description: Image id

params.name: afterImageId
params.description: Optional; HTTPS URL to receive webhook notifications.

tools.name: commerce_update-product-variant
tools.description: Updates a variant of a product. The endpoint supports partial updates. Required: productId, variantId. Optional: attributes, pricing, shippingMeasurements (plus 1 more). Returns the new ProductVariantV2.

params.name: productId
params.description: Product id

params.name: variantId
params.description: Variant id

params.name: attributes
params.description: Specifies attribute-value pairs for the variant. Supported for PHYSICAL products only.

params.name: pricing
params.description: Pricing data for the product.

params.name: shippingMeasurements
params.description: Measurements of the variant when it's shipped. Supported for PHYSICAL products only.

params.name: sku
params.description: Optional; HTTPS URL to receive webhook notifications.

tools.name: commerce_upload-product-image
tools.description: Uploads an image for a product. Uploading an image doesn't set the product's featured image. A successful request creates a ProductImage subresource of the Product. Required: productId. Returns the new UploadProductImageResponse.

params.name: productId
params.description: Product id

tools.name: commerce-analytics_get-transactions-summaries
tools.description: Retrieve transaction summaries grouped by contact. Required: contactIds, groupBy. Returns the new RetrieveTransactionsSummariesResponse.

params.name: contactIds
params.description: Contact ids

params.name: groupBy
params.description: Field to group results by, should be a contactId

tools.name: contacts_create
tools.description: Creates a new contact. Requires OAuth website scope WEBSITE_CONTACTS or WEBSITE_PROFILES (read/write). Required: firstName, lastName, locale, primaryEmail. Returns the new CreateContactResponse.

params.name: firstName
params.description: Contact's first name

params.name: lastName
params.description: Contact's last name

params.name: locale
params.description: Contact's locale

params.name: primaryEmail
params.description: Primary email supplied when creating a contact.

tools.name: contacts_delete
tools.description: Deletes the contact for the given contact ID. Requires OAuth website scope WEBSITE_CONTACTS or WEBSITE_PROFILES (read/write). Required: contactId. Destructive.

params.name: contactId
params.description: The contact's ID.

tools.name: contacts_get
tools.description: Returns a paginated list of contacts for the website. Requires OAuth website scope WEBSITE_CONTACTS_READ, WEBSITE_CONTACTS, WEBSITE_PROFILES_READ, or WEBSITE_PROFILES. Required: paginationParameters.

params.name: paginationParameters
params.description: Pagination parameters

tools.name: contacts_get-contactid
tools.description: Returns the contact for the given contact ID. Requires OAuth website scope WEBSITE_CONTACTS_READ, WEBSITE_CONTACTS, WEBSITE_PROFILES_READ, or WEBSITE_PROFILES. Required: contactId.

params.name: contactId
params.description: The contact's ID.

tools.name: contacts_patch
tools.description: Updates a contact using JSON merge patch. Requires OAuth website scope WEBSITE_CONTACTS or WEBSITE_PROFILES (read/write). Required: contactId. Optional: firstName, lastName, locale (plus 1 more). Returns the updated PatchContactResponse.

params.name: contactId
params.description: The contact's ID.

params.name: firstName
params.description: The contact's first name.

params.name: lastName
params.description: The contact's last name.

params.name: locale
params.description: The contact's locale.

params.name: primaryEmail
params.description: Primary email fields for an update request.

tools.name: contacts_query
tools.description: Returns a paginated list of contacts matching filters and sort options in the request body. Requires OAuth website scope WEBSITE_CONTACTS_READ, WEBSITE_CONTACTS, WEBSITE_PROFILES_READ, or WEBSITE_PROFILES. Optional: acceptsMarketingWithDate, cursor, donationAmount (plus 11 more).

params.name: acceptsMarketingWithDate
params.description: Contact's marketing settings with joined on date

params.name: cursor
params.description: The cursor for the next page of results. Use the value of `pagination.nextPageCursor` from the previous response.

params.name: donationAmount
params.description: Object for filtering by a min and max integer

params.name: donationCount
params.description: Object for filtering by a min and max integer

params.name: firstDonationOn
params.description: Object for filtering by before and after dates

params.name: firstOrderOn
params.description: Object for filtering by before and after dates

params.name: lastDonationOn
params.description: Object for filtering by before and after dates

params.name: lastOrderOn
params.description: Object for filtering by before and after dates

params.name: orderAmount
params.description: Object for filtering by a min and max integer

params.name: orderCount
params.description: Object for filtering by a min and max integer

params.name: pageSize
params.description: The number of contacts to return per request.

params.name: searchString
params.description: Search string for Name and Email address

params.name: sortDirection
params.description: Direction to sort results, ASCENDING or DESCENDING

params.name: sortField
params.description: Field to sort results by

tools.name: contacts_address-book_create-entry
tools.description: Creates a new address book entry for the contact. If this is the contact's only address book entry after creation, it becomes the default shipping address even when defaultShipping is false. Requires OAuth website scope WEBSITE_CONTACTS or WEBSITE_PROFILES (read/write). Required: contactId, address. Optional: defaultShipping. Returns the new CreateAddressBookEntryResponse.

params.name: contactId
params.description: The contact's ID.

params.name: address
params.description: Address properties for a contact.

params.name: defaultShipping
params.description: Whether this entry should be the default shipping address. If this is the only address book entry for the contact after creation, it becomes the default even when set to false.

tools.name: contacts_address-book_delete-entry
tools.description: Deletes the address book entry for the contact. If the deleted entry was the default shipping address, another entry is assigned as the default. Requires OAuth website scope WEBSITE_CONTACTS or WEBSITE_PROFILES (read/write). Required: contactId, addressBookEntryId. Destructive.

params.name: contactId
params.description: The contact's ID.

params.name: addressBookEntryId
params.description: The address book entry's ID.

tools.name: contacts_address-book_get
tools.description: Returns paginated addresses for the contact. When there is at least one entry, exactly one is the default shipping address (defaultShippingAddressId and each entry's defaultShipping reflect this). The default shipping address (when present) is always included on the first page of results. Requires OAuth website scope WEBSITE_CONTACTS_READ, WEBSITE_CONTACTS, WEBSITE_PROFILES_READ, or WEBSITE_PROFILES. Required: contactId, paginationParameters.

params.name: contactId
params.description: The contact's ID.

params.name: paginationParameters
params.description: Pagination parameters

tools.name: contacts_address-book_get-entry
tools.description: Returns a single address book entry for the contact. Requires OAuth website scope WEBSITE_CONTACTS_READ, WEBSITE_CONTACTS, WEBSITE_PROFILES_READ, or WEBSITE_PROFILES. Required: contactId, addressBookEntryId.

params.name: contactId
params.description: The contact's ID.

params.name: addressBookEntryId
params.description: The address book entry's ID.

tools.name: contacts_address-book_update-entry
tools.description: Replaces an address book entry for the contact with a full JSON body. When updating the entry that is currently the default, setting 'defaultShipping' from true to false has no effect. Requires OAuth website scope WEBSITE_CONTACTS or WEBSITE_PROFILES (read/write). Required: contactId, addressBookEntryId, address. Optional: defaultShipping. Returns the updated UpdateAddressBookEntryResponse.

params.name: contactId
params.description: The contact's ID.

params.name: addressBookEntryId
params.description: The address book entry's ID.

params.name: address
params.description: Address properties for a contact.

params.name: defaultShipping
params.description: Whether this entry should be the default shipping address. When updating the entry that is currently the default, changing this value from true to false has no effect.
